title: Vitalik Buterin Proposes New Approach to Stabilize DeFi During Crashes
summary: Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has suggested a new way to protect DeFi users from market crashes using options contracts instead of debt-based structures. This could make decentralized finance more resilient during extreme market downturns.
body:
Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has proposed a new method to stabilize decentralized finance (DeFi) during market crashes. In a research post published Monday, Buterin suggested creating index-tracking assets using options contracts rather than the debt-based structures that currently underpin much of DeFi.

Buterin's proposal aims to address the vulnerabilities exposed during market crashes. By using options contracts, these new assets would provide a more stable and predictable way to track market indices without relying on borrowed funds. This approach could potentially reduce the risk of liquidations and other financial losses that often occur during extreme market downturns.

For everyday DeFi users, this proposal could mean more stable and secure investment opportunities. Instead of relying on debt-based structures that can be volatile and risky, users might have access to assets that are less susceptible to sudden market fluctuations. This could make DeFi more accessible and appealing to a broader range of investors.

The next step will be to see if Buterin's proposal gains traction within the DeFi community. Developers and platforms may start exploring how to implement these ideas, potentially leading to new products and services that offer more stability during market crashes. Users should keep an eye on announcements from major DeFi platforms and watch for any new index-tracking assets that incorporate these concepts.
twitterThread: Vitalik Buterin wants to make DeFi safer during crashes. His idea? Replace debt-based structures with options contracts. 🧵
Buterin's proposal aims to create index-tracking assets that are more stable and less risky. This could protect users from sudden market downturns.

If this gains traction, DeFi could become more resilient. Watch for new products from major platforms. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-01-vitalik-buterin-proposes-new-approach-to-stabilize-defi-during-crashes
